new_classes.label_en: Other mineral waters and aerated waters (CN 2201 10 90)
new_classes.label_de: Andere Mineral- und Tafelwässer sowie Kohlensäurewasser (KN 2201 10 90)
new_classes.definition_en: Mineral waters (other than natural mineral waters) and aerated waters, not containing added sugar, sweetening matter or flavouring, and not being natural mineral water as covered by CN 2201 10 11 to 2201 10 19. Excludes natural mineral water in aerosol containers for skin care (heading 3304).

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the three main discriminating criteria for CN 2201 10 90: (1) the product is a mineral water or aerated water (MineralOrAeratedWaterQuality), (2) it contains no added sugar, sweetening matter or flavouring (NoAddedSugarOrFlavouringQuality), and (3) it is NOT a natural mineral water (complement of NaturalMineralWaterQuality), thereby distinguishing it from siblings 2201 10 11 (naturally carbonated natural mineral water) and 2201 10 19 (not carbonated natural mineral water). The exclusion of aerosol-container products destined for skin care (heading 3304) cannot be fully formalised in OWL without an explicit 'intended use' or 'presentation form' quality class for aerosol containers; this gap reduces the coverage score from 1.0 to 0.75. No new properties were required as all relevant qualities are already present in the running TBox.
